name: Siva RamaKrishna
title: Full Stack / React Native Developer

experiences.context: Full stack + mobile app development for internet/telecom SaaS platform. React + TypeScript web app and React Native (Expo) mobile app for customers and field techs. NestJS microservices backend with REST and GraphQL/Apollo APIs. FastAPI (Python) for AI/ML services. Built LangChain + RAG pipeline (pgvector + Pinecone) for AI-powered internal knowledge base. LangGraph for agentic AI workflows automating customer support and ticket routing. OpenAI API integration. Supabase for real-time data, auth, and PostgreSQL. Redis for caching and pub/sub. AWS — ECS Fargate, Lambda, S3, CloudFront, RDS, SQS, EventBridge, CloudWatch. Terraform for infra as code. Docker + Kubernetes. CI/CD with GitHub Actions. Prisma ORM. Datadog + Splunk monitoring. Led team of 4. Agile/Scrum.

Data center and network SaaS portal with React + TypeScript frontend and React Native mobile app for field engineers. NestJS and Express backend APIs. GraphQL with Apollo Server and Apollo Client. Supabase + PostgreSQL for data layer and real-time features. Prisma ORM. Redis for caching. AWS — EC2, S3, RDS, ECS Fargate, Lambda, SQS, API Gateway, CloudFront, Route53. Kong API Gateway for enterprise B2B API management, rate limiting, and auth. AWS App Mesh + Envoy sidecar proxy for service mesh across microservices. Docker + Kubernetes (self-managed on EC2). CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions. JWT + OAuth 2.0 auth. Jest + Cypress testing. Integrated LangChain for AI documentation search (late 2022). Agile/Scrum with JIRA.

Backend microservices for banking and fintech. NestJS + Express REST APIs and GraphQL with Apollo for internal data aggregation. FastAPI (Python) for data processing services. Supabase + PostgreSQL + Sequelize ORM. Redis for session management and caching. AWS Lambda for serverless event-driven processing, SQS for message queuing, SNS for notifications, API Gateway. LDAP + OAuth 2.0 for enterprise auth. ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) for log monitoring. Docker + Kubernetes. GitHub Actions CI/CD. Jest for TDD. React frontend for internal dashboards.

Satellite and broadband SaaS platform. React + Redux + Hooks (React Hooks released early 2019) frontend with TypeScript. React Native mobile app for customer-facing features. NestJS + Express backend REST APIs. MongoDB + PostgreSQL. Redis for caching. AWS — EC2, S3, RDS, DynamoDB, ECS, Lambda, API Gateway. Docker + Kubernetes. CI/CD with Jenkins and GitHub Actions. WebSockets + Socket.io for real-time features. GraphQL early adoption. JWT auth. Jest + Mocha testing. Webpack + Babel build tooling. Agile team.

India-based software consultancy. React v15/v16 frontends with Redux state management. Node.js/Express REST API backends. Angular (v4/v5) for enterprise client dashboards. TypeScript (early adoption). PostgreSQL + MongoDB databases. Redis caching. Docker (early containerization). AWS EC2 + S3. Kafka for event-driven messaging. Webpack + Grunt build tooling. Bootstrap + responsive CSS. NGINX reverse proxy. Git + GitHub. REST API design and integration. npm package management.

Software development firm in Nagpur, India. Built web applications with early React (v0.13/v0.14), Node.js/Express, HTML5/CSS3, JavaScript ES5/ES6 (Babel). jQuery for interactive UI components. REST APIs with Node.js/Express. MySQL + PostgreSQL. Bootstrap responsive design. AWS EC2 + S3 for deployments. Git + SVN version control. AJAX for dynamic content. npm for package management. Webpack for bundling. Agile methodology.
